acceptance.assertion: The Grabowski PR gate requires current critical self-review evidence, not just PR comments.
Self-review evidence remains bound to current PR head and diff hash.
Focused PR review gate tests cover the critical self-review workflow.

goal: Bind the Grabowski critical self-review workflow PR to a Bureau task so open PR reservations are structured and auditable.

validated_acceptance.diff-bound: PR #111 binds self-review evidence to current head and diff hash; PR #112 hardens path control validation before trimming.
validated_acceptance.gate-tests: PR #111/#112 expanded focused PR review gate tests and make validate passed before merge.
validated_acceptance.workflow-evidence-required: PR #111 requires structured current self-review evidence instead of PR comments.

metadata.verification_note: Grabowski PR #111 merged and established critical self-review workflow evidence; PR #112 merged the trailing-control-character follow-up. GitHub CI passed on both PRs; Grabowski main synced to merge commit 7661df4 before closeout.

title: Enforce critical self-review gate workflow
